architecture.summary: N/A - UI-only fix in existing React SPA (SkillFileBrowser.tsx, SecondaryFileViewer.tsx). No architectural changes. Same component hierarchy, same data flow.

integrations.summary: N/A - No external integrations involved. Purely frontend component fixes within the existing eval-ui.

performance.summary: N/A - Trivial UI changes (sticky bar, tree expand state). No data volume, bundle, or rendering performance concerns.

security.summary: N/A - No auth, no user input beyond existing file editing, no new data paths. Localhost-only UI.

ui-ux.summary: Full-width sticky save bar at bottom with Unsaved changes text + Save + Cancel. Ctrl+S/Cmd+S only when secondary editor focused. No extra dirty indicator. Toolbar for other file types: Edit + Save + Cancel + file size. Confirm dialog on navigation with unsaved changes.

edge-cases.summary: Unsaved changes on file navigation triggers confirm dialog. Discard or stay. No auto-save.
